strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise confirmed across multiple consecutive senior roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital), directly matching the primary stack
Active AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — satisfying the explicitly required 'AI agent development' competency
15+ years of fullstack breadth including Docker/Kubernetes, MongoDB, cloud (AWS CDK), and sustained TDD practice with evidence of architectural contribution
concerns: NestJS is entirely absent from the resume despite being the primary backend framework for this role
React experience is limited to one explicit mention (Optilyz); the majority of frontend work references Ember.js, raising questions about React depth
Required testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) are never named; TDD methodology is evidenced but not tied to the specified toolchain
response.justification: Bogdan's TypeScript and Node.js credentials are well-evidenced across several senior roles, and his current position at re:cinq building MCP code generators and AI agent infrastructure directly addresses the role's 'AI agent development' requirement — a rare and high-weight competency. His career demonstrates genuine fullstack range, including Kubernetes, MongoDB, AWS CDK, and consistent TDD practice. The clearest gap is NestJS, which is the primary backend framework and goes completely unmentioned; React depth is also thinner than ideal given the Ember.js-heavy frontend history. These are learnable gaps for an engineer at this level, and the AI agent match is a strong differentiator. Score derived from: two high-weight positives (AI agents, TS/Node) offset by one medium-weight negative (NestJS absence) and two minor gaps (React depth, testing toolchain).
